zh.lifeSummary: Agatha De Aguilon於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞格亞特 坦格利。她於大約1207年與Richard de Tangley結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1270年之前。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aguilon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Jesus, Pablo, Juan, Agustin, Carlos, Ernesto, Manuel, Roberto, Ruben, Santiago.
habitational name from any of several places called Aguillón in Spain (Asturias or Galicia), or Aguillon in Var, France.

en.lifeSummary: Agatha De Aguilon was born about 1180, in Great Tangley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. She married Richard de Tangley about 1207. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died before 1270.

ko.lifeSummary: Agatha De Aguilon(은)는 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 그리트 탠글리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1207년 Richard de Tangley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1270년 이전 사망했다.
